title: UART FIFO overflow write
description: The UART receive path increments the FIFO write pointer even when the FIFO is already full.
rtl: module uart_rx(input logic clk, input logic reset_n, input logic rx_valid, input logic fifo_full, output logic [7:0] wr_ptr); always @(posedge clk) begin if (!reset_n) wr_ptr <= '0; else if (rx_valid) wr_ptr <= wr_ptr + 1; end endmodule
testbench: UART receive test expects writes to be blocked while fifo_full is asserted.
expected_root_cause: UART FIFO write pointer increments while FIFO is full
failure_log:
UVM_ERROR: FIFO write pointer advanced while fifo_full was asserted.
ASSERTION FAILED: wr_ptr must not increment on overflow.
COVERAGE: 47.5
success_log:
UVM_INFO: FIFO overflow protection behaved as expected.
ASSERTION PASSED: wr_ptr held constant while fifo_full was asserted.
COVERAGE: 91.0
